title: Cold-Weather Stiffness
subtitle: Companion Workbook — build the winter routine that keeps you mobile
author: Nate Ratcliff, LMT
license: For Healing Hands By Nate members. Personal use only. Please don't redistribute — share the membership instead.
description: Print it. Put it on your nightstand or bathroom mirror. Fill it in over the next 7 days. Bring it to your next session.
